title: Extract OBU brand colors into CSS custom properties
description: OBU Green (#295b30) and OBU Gold (#c48b2b) are repeated as literal hex values throughout obu.css. Define them once as :root custom properties (--obu-green, --obu-gold, plus tints like the #faf8f3/#f7f3ea backgrounds) and reference via var(). Makes rebranding/tweaking a single-point change. Watch the @media print block and !important usage.

title: Add a general-purpose / website stylesheet
description: Repo is intended to also hold CSS for websites, not just Markdown→PDF. Add a web-facing OBU stylesheet. Unlike obu.css it should NOT rely on !important. Ideally share brand tokens with the Markdown sheet (depends on the custom-properties work).

title: Add stylelint config for CSS linting/formatting
description: No linting today. Add a stylelint config (e.g. stylelint-config-standard) to keep formatting consistent (2-space indent, lowercase hex, one selector per line) across stylesheets as the repo grows.
